Madden NFL 2003 

Press Z+L For 1st Down
287348B8 00005000

E2000001 80008000

Press Z+R For 4th Down
287348B8 00003000

E2000001 80008000

R+Left To End Quarter
287348B8 00002100
044B6404 00000001
E2000001 80008000

287348B8 00002200

E2000001 80008000

287348B8 00004200
